title: Rs 1.56 Crore Awarded to Kin of Noida Road Death Victim in 2023 Case
description: On the evening of October 20, 2023, Sethi was near Sector 62 in Noida, returning home on a motorcycle with her colleague, when a speeding car hit two other vehicles before crashing into their motorcycle from behind. Sethi died of wounds from the accident on January 2, 2024.
